PR: #14208

Scope reviewed:
- packages/ui/src/cloud/shell/ConsoleShell.tsx
- packages/ui/src/cloud/shell/ConsoleShell.test.tsx

Manual review:
- Confirmed the account menu trigger hid all text below `md` and exposed only an aria-hidden chevron.
- Added a stable accessible name: `Account menu for <email>` or `Account menu`.
- Confirmed sign-out used low-level `clearStoredStewardToken()` + `clearStewardSession()` directly.
- Changed sign-out to use `clearStaleStewardSession()`, which also scrubs persisted active-server/profile token mirrors and clears configured/direct Steward session cookies.

Verification:
- node packages/app-core/scripts/ensure-shared-i18n-data.mjs
- bunx @biomejs/biome check packages/ui/src/cloud/shell/ConsoleShell.tsx packages/ui/src/cloud/shell/ConsoleShell.test.tsx --write --no-errors-on-unmatched
- bun run --cwd packages/ui test src/cloud/shell/ConsoleShell.test.tsx

Focused test result:
- Test Files: 1 passed
- Tests: 7 passed

Evidence gaps:
- Full rendered app audit/screenshots/video are still required for the broader visible console UI changes before #14208 is merge-ready.
